use rayon::{ThreadPool, ThreadPoolBuilder};
use std::sync::Arc;

struct Processor {
    pool: Arc<ThreadPool>,
}

impl Processor {
    // GOOD: pool created once, shared across calls
    fn new(num_threads: usize) -> Self {
        let pool = ThreadPoolBuilder::new()
            .num_threads(num_threads)
            .build()
            .unwrap();
        Self { pool: Arc::new(pool) }
    }

    fn process_batch(&self, items: &[Item]) -> Vec<Output> {
        self.pool.install(|| {
            items.par_iter()
                .map(|item| transform(item))
                .collect()
        })
    }

    fn analyze_dataset(&self, data: &[f64]) -> Stats {
        self.pool.install(|| {
            let mean = data.par_iter().sum::<f64>() / data.len() as f64;
            let variance = data.par_iter()
                .map(|x| (x - mean).powi(2))
                .sum::<f64>() / data.len() as f64;
            Stats { mean, variance }
        })
    }
}
